Zhu Bao śúĪŤ§í
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Bao (śúĪŤ§í). Rebelled against Shu with Yong Kai and Gao Ding. Killed when Gao Ding defected. Zhu Bao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and Nanman. Zhu Bao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
